name: Zombies ate my Castle
author: Poki
description: Zombies ate my Castle is a tower defense game where your allies are, well… zombies! Defend your castle by strategically deploying your undead army. Summon a zombie carrier to gather fallen foes and transform them into loyal zombie soldiers ready to fight for your cause. Cast powerful spells to weaken your enemies and give your zombies the upper hand in battle. Earn coins from your victories and use them to upgrade your skills and boost your army. Can you fight your way through all the enemies and save the zombie princess? How to play Zombies ate my Castle? Click to select a zombie and click on your target to cause damage. Who created Zombies ate my Castle? Zombies ate my Castle is created by Games by Piotr. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Zombies ate my Castle for free? You can play Zombies ate my Castle for free on Poki. Can I play Zombies ate my Castle on mobile devices and desktop? Zombies ate my Castle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
